tracks.title: Life as a Git repository
tracks.lyrics:
I hold your history in my branches deep,
Each commit a moment you promised to keep,
Changes staged in the quiet of night,
Waiting for messages to make them right.

I'm tracking your journey, line by line,
Every decision, every design,
You push forward but I hold the past,
Nothing you do will ever not last.

I'm a repository of your becoming,
Where all of your changes keep humming,
Branch out, explore, take risks so bold,
I'll merge your story, I'll never let go.

I'm patient as you rebase and refine,
Confident in my remote and mine,
Conflicts arise but we work through the pain,
Resolve what divides, let harmony reign.

I'm a repository of your becoming,
Where all of your changes keep humming,
Branch out, explore, take risks so bold,
I'll merge your story, I'll never let go.

In my stash lies what you set aside,
Dreams deferred but not denied,
Main holds your steady, proven way,
While origins remember yesterday,
I don't judge your pulls or your reverts,
I archive the wins and the hurts,
Tag your versions, mark the milestones passed,
Every version matters, nothing's cast.

I'm a repository of your becoming,
Where all of your changes keep humming,
Branch out, explore, take risks so bold,
I'll merge your story, I'll never let go,
I'll merge your story, I'll never let go.
